content: Phase 1: Backend layer (validation, repos, services, actions)
Phase 1: Admin pages (clients CRUD, services catalogue, team list)
Phase 1: Team pages (workspace, clients, tasks, compliance, queries)
Phase 1: Client portal pages (dashboard, tasks, queries)
Phase 1: Cron endpoints (monthly task gen, due alerts)
Phase 1: Critical bug fix — Server Actions CSRF (x-forwarded-host proxy rewrite)
Phase 2: Vaults, Documents, Team Ops, vCFO, BizLens embed
Phase 3: Polish, DPDP audit, launch prep
